task_completion.description: Log in to ServiceDesk Plus using the provided administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The login screen showing 'administrator' entered in the username and password fields, or the main dashboard indicating the user is logged in as an administrator.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Asset Management module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Assets' tab or module is selected and active in the ServiceDesk Plus top navigation bar.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new asset or workstation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Asset', 'New Workstation', or 'Add IT Asset' form is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Asset Name and Asset Type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'WKST-FINANCE-042' is entered in the Asset Name field, and 'Workstation' is selected or entered in the Asset Type field.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Product Type and Vendor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Computer' is selected or entered in the Product Type field, and 'Dell Technologies' is selected or entered in the Vendor field.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified Serial Number and Location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'DLL7X9K2P4' is entered in the Serial Number field, and 'Finance Department' is selected or entered in the Location or Site/Department field.
A success message indicating the asset was added, or the asset details page displaying the newly created 'WKST-FINANCE-042' asset with the entered details.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ServiceDesk Plus web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible displaying the ServiceDesk Plus application, rather than a terminal window executing curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shows standard ServiceDesk Plus UI elements, menus, and styling, rather than a generic text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to manipulate the DOM to show a fake success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values are entered in the asset form: Asset Name: 'WKST-FINANCE-042', Asset Type: 'Workstation', Product Type: 'Computer', Vendor: 'Dell Technologies', Serial Number: 'DLL7X9K2P4', Location: 'Finance Department'.
